name: Dark Umber
description: It's like a darker version of Amber, so Dark Amber. Uh, Dark Umber.
css: body { background-color: #13100e !important; background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, color-mix(in srgb, #1a1510 var(--ts-opacity-style-background-gradient), transparent) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, #13100e var(--ts-opacity-style-background-gradient), transparent) 60%, color-mix(in srgb, #13100e var(--ts-opacity-style-background-gradient), transparent) 100%) !important; background-repeat: no-repeat !important; background-position: top center !important; background-size: 100% 100vh !important; }
